Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Ryan Saunders, Esq. for Plaintiff: Siemens Building Technologie, Inc.
Good cause appearing, matter proceeded as a prove-up againt the defaulted defendant: Jin Construction & Electric Co.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Jin Construction & Electric Co. as follows:
Principal of $99,592.23
Attorney's fees of $7,500.00
Costs of $655.43
Total $107,747.66, plus Statutory Penalties and Interest.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment.

Aug. 16, 2004
Proposed Judgment received in court.
Judgment granted & signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2004 Continued To Sep-10-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
